description: Many jottings of different kinds. The hand may belong to one of the well-known 12th-century Geniza scribes. Includes a section on ophthalmology mentioning the properties of "al-ʿinabiyya" (= the grape-like layer = the uvea).
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
